form.label: demo-backend Correlation – production
form.description: RED metrics · operations · recent traces · trace waterfall

search.query: search index=main sourcetype=otel earliest=-4h | stats count by service.name | sort -count

search index=main sourcetype=otel earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$ service.name=$service_name|s$ kind=SPAN_KIND_SERVER | eval duration_ms=(end_time - start_time)/1000000 | timechart span=1m perc50(duration_ms) AS p50 perc90(duration_ms) AS p90 perc99(duration_ms) AS p99
search index=main sourcetype=otel earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$ service.name=$service_name|s$ kind=SPAN_KIND_SERVER | timechart span=1m count AS requests

search index=main sourcetype=otel earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$ service.name=$service_name|s$ kind=SPAN_KIND_SERVER | timechart span=1m count(eval(match('status.code', "STATUS_CODE_ERROR"))) AS errors count AS total | eval error_pct=round(errors/total*100, 2) | fields _time error_pct

search index=main sourcetype=otel earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$ service.name=$service_name|s$ kind=SPAN_KIND_SERVER | stats count AS requests avg(eval((end_time-start_time)/1000000)) AS avg_ms perc99(eval((end_time-start_time)/1000000)) AS p99_ms by name | eval avg_ms=round(avg_ms,1) | eval p99_ms=round(p99_ms,1) | sort -requests | head 15 | rename name AS Endpoint requests AS Requests avg_ms AS "Avg (ms)" p99_ms AS "P99 (ms)"

search index=main sourcetype=otel earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$ service.name=$service_name|s$ "status.code"=STATUS_CODE_ERROR | stats count AS errors by name | sort -errors | head 15 | rename name AS Endpoint

search index=main sourcetype=otel earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$ service.name=$service_name|s$ kind=SPAN_KIND_SERVER | eval duration_ms=(end_time - start_time)/1000000 | chart perc50(duration_ms) AS p50 perc99(duration_ms) AS p99 by name | sort -p99

panel.title: Recent Traces (slowest first) — click a row to load waterfall

search.query: index=main sourcetype=otel kind=SPAN_KIND_SERVER service.name=$service_name|s$ earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$| eval duration_ms = round((end_time - start_time)/1000000, 1)| stats first(_time) AS _time, first(name) AS name, max(duration_ms) AS duration_ms, first(status.code) AS status_code BY trace_id| sort 50 -duration_ms| eval status = case(status_code=="ERROR", "❌ Error", status_code=="OK", "✅ OK", true(), "⚪ Unset")| table _time trace_id name duration_ms status| rename name AS "Endpoint", duration_ms AS "Duration (ms)", trace_id AS "Trace ID"

search index=main sourcetype=otel trace_id="$trace_id_input$" kind=SPAN_KIND_* | dedup span_id | eval span_name=if(isnull(name) OR name="", "(unnamed)", name) | eval duration_ms=round((end_time - start_time)/1000000, 1) | sort 0 start_time | eventstats min(start_time) AS trace_start max(end_time) AS trace_end | eval trace_dur=(trace_end - trace_start) | eval offset_ms=round((start_time - trace_start)/1000000, 1) | eval is_root=if(parent_span_id="" OR isnull(parent_span_id), 1, 0) | eval depth=case(is_root=1, 0, kind="SPAN_KIND_CLIENT", 1, kind=SPAN_KIND_SERVER AND is_root=0, 2, kind="SPAN_KIND_INTERNAL", 3, 1==1, 1) | eval indent=case(depth=0, "■ ", depth=1, "├─ ", depth=2, "│ └─ ", 1==1, "│ └─ ") | eval span_label=indent . span_name | eval bar_total=40 | eval offset_frac=if(trace_dur>0, (start_time - trace_start)/trace_dur, 0) | eval dur_frac=if(trace_dur>0, (end_time - start_time)/trace_dur, 0) | eval pad_count=max(round(offset_frac * bar_total), 0) | eval bar_count=max(round(dur_frac * bar_total), 1) | eval pad_count=if(isnull(pad_count) OR pad_count < 0, 0, pad_count) | eval bar_count=if(isnull(bar_count) OR bar_count < 1, 1, bar_count) | eval pad_str=if(pad_count>0, substr("░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░", 1, pad_count), "") | eval bar_str=substr("▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓", 1, bar_count) | eval timing=pad_str . bar_str . " " . tostring(duration_ms) . "ms" | eval svc=service.name | table span_label svc kind offset_ms duration_ms timing | rename span_label AS "Span" svc AS "Service" kind AS "Kind" offset_ms AS "Offset (ms)" duration_ms AS "Duration (ms)" timing AS "Timing"
